name: 15-invalid-source-mismatch
description: Entry in capabilities.declared[] has source: "observed". Per ADR-0005, schema enforces: every entry in declared[] has source="declared", every entry in observed[] has source="observed". Mismatch rejects.
notes: The source field is redundant with array containment but kept for Rego ergonomics when policies flatten capabilities. Schema-enforced consistency ensures the two representations never drift.
